📂 COMMENT DISTRIBUTION (Cumulative)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Category 1 - Questions:          ~100 (32.7%) → All auto-responded
  • Typical patterns: "How do I...", "What tools...", "What's the cost?"
  • Template: "Thanks for asking! I'll reach out with more info soon."
  
Category 2 - Praise:             ~60 (19.6%) → All auto-responded
  • Typical patterns: "Amazing!", "Inspiring", "Love this"
  • Template: "So grateful for this! Your support keeps us going. 🚀"
  
Category 3 - Spam:               ~80 (26.1%) → Logged only (no response)
  • Typical patterns: Crypto, MLM, forex, suspicious links
  • Action: Filtered and logged
  
Category 4 - Sales/Partnership:  ~38 (12.4%) → Flagged for manual review
  • Typical patterns: "Partnership", "Collaboration", "Sponsorship"
  • Action: Flagged in system for user to review manually
  
Other/Neutral:                   ~28 (9.2%) → Logged with status

• For PRODUCTION with real YouTube comments:
  1. Obtain YouTube API credentials from Google Console
  2. Save to: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.secrets/youtube-credentials.json
  3. Script will auto-authenticate on next run
  
• Current mode is safe for testing and demonstrates full functionality
• Zero production data exposure in demo mode
